regulatory_status: sNDA filed — awaiting FDA pre-approval inspection
critical_quality_attributes: Dissolution (Q=80% at 30 min in pH 6.8 phosphate buffer)
Polymorphic form (monohydrate Form I confirmed by XRPD)
Related substances (incl. ICH M7 mutagenic impurities)
critical_process_parameters: Granulation water addition temperature (< 30°C for monohydrate stability)
Blending time post-lubrication (NMT 3 min — over-lubrication risk)
